name: Central Coast Stir-Fry Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut carrots, celery, squash, and zucchini into 1/2 x 2-inch pieces.
2. Break broccoli and cauliflower into small pieces.
3. Heat oil in a large pan until almost smoking.
4. Add vegetables to the pan; stir to coat with oil.
5. Add minced garlic, salt, pepper, basil, and oregano.
6. Simmer for 1 minute.
7. Add wine and continue simmering for an additional 2 minutes or until vegetables are cooked al dente.
8. Stir in chopped parsley and lemon juice.
9. Serve immediately.
